old_value: {"id":"smallhold-bno","title":"Inbound Delete activity","description":"Handle inbound Delete{Note} and Delete{Actor} activities. Delete of a Note removes the remote_posts row (and associated mentions, notifications). Delete of an Actor removes the remote_accounts row, their posts, their follows, and their follower relationships. Activities arriving for objects that don't exist should be silently ignored (no 500, no 404 error).","design":"Delete.object may be a URI string or an object with id field. Match against remote_posts.ap_uri or remote_accounts.actor_uri. Use ON DELETE CASCADE or explicit cleanup queries. Verify the Delete is signed by the same actor that owns the object (or same domain).","acceptance_criteria":"Delete of known remote post removes it from remote_posts and timelines; Delete of unknown post is silently ignored; Delete of Actor removes all their data; delete triggers streaming 'delete' event for affected local actors","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-04-23T00:00:33Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-04-23T00:00:33Z","metadata":{},"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"","depends_on_id":"smallhold-ryy","type":"relates-to","created_at":"2026-04-22T17:00:39Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
